case_title: CELIA CASTILLO VS. WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,626.00 FILED BY CASTILLO, CELIA AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, CELIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. MARIA TAFOLLA ACTS AS SPANISH INTERPRETER ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, CELIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
